case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS AYERS, KAREN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,634.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT AYERS, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AYERS, KAREN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYERS, KAREN $3,694.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,694.50, SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3694.50. CASE CONTINUED TO 9/13/05 AT 1:30 PM FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR 6 MONTHS INTERVALS UNTIL PAID OFF AT WHICH TIME CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
